title: PrismaFi - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by trove manipulation on restaking protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls closeTrove() or openTrove() after a flash loan in the same tx
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> closeTrove() or openTrove() in single tx

red_flags: Manipulation of troveManager functions after a flash loan
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS closeTrove() OR openTrove() IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING A FLASHLOAN IN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: PrismaFi fell victim to a flash loan attack where the attacker manipulated troveManager functions to drain 3258 wstETH worth $11.6 million. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing calls to closeTrove() or openTrove() immediately following a flash loan.
